global.description: The ad features a dark background with a product showcase and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on products.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular area featuring three vertical panels, resembling a product showcase or app interface.

elements.label: Discount message
elements.description: Text displaying a promotional message, bold and centered, indicating a discount offer.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a percentage discount, prominently placed to attract attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like element with text prompting users to take action, positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo of the brand 'ZenDrop', displayed at the top of the ad in a clear and recognizable format.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, subtly placed in the top corner.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline text that communicates the main offer, designed to catch the viewer's eye.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Reward message
elements.description: Text indicating a reward claim, positioned at the bottom of the ad for easy visibility.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The brand logo 'ZenDrop' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, placed in the top corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold text, discount offer, brand logo.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, UGC, Up to 40% off Only this weekend, 30% Claim reward
